arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Celtic – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa host Celtic in their final fixture of the Champions League’s league phase tonight. Both teams are guaranteed a place in the playoffs but have a chance of automatic progress to the Round of 16 with a win. Villa are outside the top eight on goal difference after an impressive European campaign under Unai […] The post Aston Villa vs Celtic – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Emery has Chelsea DREAM as star says YES to Aston Villa move
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Chelsea have been locked in transfer talks in recent days, with at least one deal set to be done between the clubs as Unai Emery attempts to close in on his dream target. Football transfer news reporter Fabrizio Romano has revealed that Emery’s “dream” transfer target is out-of-favour Chelsea star Joao Felix, and the Italian says that should the opportunity arise, the Spaniard will certainly try to sign his compatriot before the transfer deadline on 3 February.

arts.ttl: Celtic outcast Lagerbielke could have permanent FC Twente transfer sealed this month
arts.sum: FC Twente want to sign Celtic defender Gustaf Lagerbielke on a permanent deal.

arts.ttl: Why Aston Villa fans are fuming with Unai Emery's Champions League Celtic comments

arts.sum: Kieran Tierney’s big Celtic return has been confirmed as ON - but whether that will be before the January transfer window deadline remains to be seen.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher fires warning shots to Aston Villa about Celtic clash after Unai Emery's actions
arts.sum: Either way, it is going to be a spectacle and there is a lot of pressure on Villa heading into this game because of how things are panning out in the Premier League. Jamie Carragher fired a warning shot to the club and how it’s ‘crunch time’ ahead of Celtic’s visit, including how they need to win the match to avoid playing the play-off rounds, as he told Sky Sports Football (26/01/25 at 7:20 pm).

arts.ttl: “Monchi wants him very much” – Aston Villa hovering for player after West Ham offer rejected
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Aston Villa continue to have interest in Galatasaray attacker Baris Alper Yilmaz. The 24-year-old has been linked with West Ham United and Nottingham Forest in recent weeks after he impressed for Turkey at last summer’s Euros and carried that form through into this season.
